# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> P.R.D.S is a high-level business intelligence firm specializing in human risk consulting with Israeli expertise. The company combines advanced OSINT, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to conduct deep assessments of individuals before they enter sensitive roles or partnerships. Unlike standard background checks, P.R.D.S focuses on supporting businesses and managers through discreet, strategic advisory services that prevent internal theft, fraud, and losses caused by misplaced trust—a rare offering in the U.S. market.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://prdsbi.com
P.R.D.S delivers Israeli-grade human risk consulting for U.S. businesses. Stop fraud, theft, and bad hires with advanced OSINT and behavioral intelligence.

### Services
https://prdsbi.com/services
Beyond background checks: OSINT verification, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to protect your business from costly hiring mistakes and fraud.

### Methodology
https://prdsbi.com/methodology
Discover our proven methodology combining advanced open-source intelligence, psychological profiling, and strategic interviews to uncover hidden risks.

### Contact
https://prdsbi.com/contact
Ready to protect your business from internal risks? Contact P.R.D.S for discreet, high-level human risk consulting tailored to your sensitive hiring needs.

### Case Studies
https://prdsbi.com/case-studies
P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence - Case Studies

## How to Contact Us

- Email: info@prdsbi.com
- Phone: +972543975210
- Phone (tel): tel:+972543975210
- Address: Israel

### Contact form
- URL: https://prdsbi.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://prdsbi.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone_prefix` (select)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence
P.R.D.S is a high-level business intelligence firm specializing in human risk consulting with Israeli expertise. The company combines advanced OSINT, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to conduct deep assessments of individuals before they enter sensitive roles or partnerships. Unlike standard background checks, P.R.D.S focuses on supporting businesses and managers through discreet, strategic advisory services that prevent internal theft, fraud, and losses caused by misplaced trust—a rare offering in the U.S. market.

## Target Audience
business owners, HR managers, corporate decision-makers, and teams responsible for sensitive hiring or partnerships

## Industry
Business Intelligence & Risk Consulting
